title: Your First 2D Game
creator: Godot Engine community
description: A step-by-step project covering scenes, player movement, animation, collisions, enemy spawning, scoring, sound, and exporting in Godot.
useful: A complete small project for developers who already know basic programming and want to learn Godot's structure.
audience: Beginning Godot users who already understand basic programming concepts.
learning: Build a small game from scenes and scripts
Add movement, collisions, enemies, score, and sound
